title: 动漫插画创作图
description: A high-energy VTuber thumbnail illustration of a smiling anime girl with {argument name="hair color" default="bright blue"} hair in a high ponytail wearing a white shirt. The background is an explosive burst of rainbow l
prompt_raw: A high-energy VTuber thumbnail illustration of a smiling anime girl with {argument name="hair color" default="bright blue"} hair in a high ponytail wearing a white shirt. The background is an explosive burst of rainbow light rays and golden sparkles. A golden retro microphone sits in the bottom left. Massive, shiny 3D gold text on the left reads "{argument name="main title text" default="初配信"}". A 3D gold and blue subtitle reads "{argument name="subtitle text" default="一緒に最高の時間を！"}". An ornate blue and gold oval badge in the bottom right displays "{argument name="character name" default="エリン Erin"}". A red top-right badge reads "{argument name="badge text" default="LIVE"}".
prompt_preview: A high-energy VTuber thumbnail illustration of a smiling anime girl with {argument name="hair color" default="bright blue"} hair in a high ponytail wearing a white shirt. The background is an explosive burst of rainbow l
prompt_display_cn:
案例「hair color」属于动漫插画创作图。这是一条综合视觉案例，需要从原始提示词中提炼画面类型、主体、风格、构图、文字和用途，再转成中文展示版与可填空模板。

原始提示词要点：这条案例原文以英文描述画面，需要转成中文展示版。它的主要内容包括：A high-energy VTuber thumbnail 插画 of a smiling anime girl with 【hair color：bright blue】 hair in a high ponytail wearing a white shirt. The 背景 is an explosive burst of rainbow 光线 rays and golden sparkles. A golden retro microphone sits in the bottom left. Massive, shiny 3D gold text on the left reads "【main 标题 text：初配信】". A 3D gold and blue sub标题 reads "【sub标题 text：一緒に最高の時間を！】". An ornate blue and gold oval badge in the bottom right displays "【角色 name：エリン Erin】". A red top-right badge reads "【badge text：LIVE】".
prompt_template_cn:
生成一张【主题】的视觉设计图。

画面主体：
主要表现【主体对象】，突出【核心特征】。

风格与氛围：
整体风格为【视觉风格】，氛围为【情绪氛围】，主色调为【主色调】。

构图与背景：
采用【构图方式】，背景包含【背景元素】，辅助元素包括【辅助元素】。

文字内容：
如需文字，显示【文字内容】，要求清晰可读，不要乱码。

输出要求：
画面比例为【画面比例】，适合用于【使用场景】。
